sector.name_zh: 电路板与 PCB 标签
sector.subhead_en: Engineered for reliable PCB traceability. Built to withstand demanding manufacturing processes while delivering durable, clear identification throughout production.
sector.subhead_zh: 为可靠的 PCB 追溯而生 承受严苛的制造工艺,在整个生产过程中提供耐久、清晰的标识
sector.intro_en: PCB labels are organised by process: where the label is applied, what it must survive and the recommended material. Every product is available under three series — Polyonics APEX, Polyonics XF and E-Label — the same construction under each identity.
sector.intro_zh: PCB 标签按工序组织:标签贴在哪里、必须承受什么、推荐哪种材料 每一款都提供三个系列 —— Polyonics APEX、Polyonics XF 与 E-Label —— 同一材料,三种标识

processes.lead_en: Withstands solder reflow, harsh chemicals, and high-temperature cleaning while maintaining strong adhesion and barcode readability.
processes.lead_zh: 承受回流焊、强腐蚀化学品与高温清洗,同时保持强粘接与条码可读
processes.overview_en: Polyimide film with a reinforced wash-resistant topcoat and dual-ESD, low-charging construction — the material that stays put and stays readable through repeated reflow and aggressive aqueous wash.
processes.overview_zh: 聚酰亚胺薄膜,配强化耐洗表层与双 ESD 低电荷结构 —— 在反复回流与强碱水洗中不翘、不糊、始终可读的材料
processes.challenge_en: Survive 260–300 °C multiple reflow passes and strong Zestron/Kyzen cleaning with no smearing or lifting, keeping small text and dense barcodes scannable.
processes.challenge_zh: 承受 260-300℃ 多次回流,以及 Zestron/Kyzen 强力清洗,印字不糊、标签不翘,小字与密集条码保持可读

products.spec_en: 2 mil heavy gloss white; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant topcoat; -70~100 °C; UL/MIL; no print pre-heat
products.spec_zh: 2mil 加厚亮光白;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗表层;-70~100℃;UL/MIL;无需打印预热

products.spec_en: 1 mil gloss white; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant coating; no pre-heat; UL/MIL; thermal transfer
products.spec_zh: 1mil 亮光白;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗涂层;无需预热;UL/MIL 认证;热转印

products.spec_en: 1 mil highest-temp white specialty PI; non-ESD; 300 °C short-term; R4300 ribbon meets SAE AS81530; ultra-durable high-temp adhesive; dual-side
products.spec_zh: 1mil 最耐高温白色特种 PI;无 ESD;短时耐 300℃;搭配 R4300 碳带满足 SAE AS81530;超耐久高温胶;正反面通用

products.spec_en: 2 mil highest-temp white specialty PI; non-ESD; 300 °C short-term; R4300 ribbon meets SAE AS81531; ultra-durable high-temp adhesive; dual-side
products.spec_zh: 2mil 最耐高温白色特种 PI;无 ESD;短时耐 300℃;搭配 R4300 碳带满足 SAE AS81531;超耐久高温胶;正反面通用

products.spec_en: 2 mil matte white PI; non-ESD; -70~100 °C; UL/MIL; thermal transfer
products.spec_zh: 2mil 哑光白 PI;无 ESD;-70~100℃;UL、MIL;热转印

processes.lead_en: Resists cleaning chemicals, solvents, and moderate heat for reliable identification in non-reflow PCB processes.
processes.lead_zh: 耐清洗化学品、溶剂与中等热,在非回流 PCB 工序中提供可靠标识
processes.overview_en: The same polyimide construction as Wash & Reflow, with a no-pre-heat coating tuned for repeated washing and moderate heat — without paying for a full reflow rating this process never uses.
processes.overview_zh: 与清洗回流同款聚酰亚胺结构,配免预热涂层,专为反复清洗与中等热调校 —— 不为这一工序用不到的完整回流耐温买单
processes.challenge_en: Withstand repeated aggressive washing and moderate heat with no pre-heat, keeping print legible — without paying for capability this process never uses.
processes.challenge_zh: 免预热下承受反复强力清洗和中等热,保持印字可读,不为用不到的能力买单

products.spec_en: 2 mil heavy gloss white; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant topcoat; -70~100 °C; UL/MIL; no print pre-heat
products.spec_zh: 2mil 加厚亮光白;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗表层;-70~100℃;UL/MIL;无需打印预热

products.spec_en: 1 mil gloss white; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant coating; no pre-heat; UL/MIL; thermal transfer
products.spec_zh: 1mil 亮光白;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗涂层;无需预热;UL/MIL 认证;热转印

processes.lead_en: Designed for finished PCB assemblies, providing durable identification for serial numbers, barcodes, and quality control.
processes.lead_zh: 面向成品 PCB 组件,为序列号、条码与质量控制提供耐久标识
processes.overview_en: Polyester rather than polyimide — ESD-safe, thin and lower-cost, right-sized for finished boards and assemblies that never see reflow heat.
processes.overview_zh: 用聚酯而非聚酰亚胺 —— ESD 安全、薄、成本更低,为不再经受回流热的成品板与组件量身匹配
processes.challenge_en: ESD-safe, thin and low-cost — without over-engineering with heat resistance the process never uses.
processes.challenge_zh: ESD 安全、薄、低成本,不为用不到的耐热能力买单

products.spec_en: Flame-retardant polyester; UL94 V-0, self-extinguishing; battery-safe; 2 mil
products.spec_zh: 阻燃聚酯;UL94 V-0 阻燃、自熄;电池环境安全;2mil

products.spec_en: Post-process polyester; medical-grade, abrasion-resistant, permanent; 2 mil gloss white; -40~180 °C; UL 969
products.spec_zh: 后处理聚酯;医疗设备级、耐磨耐擦、永久标识;2mil 光面白;-40~180℃;UL 969

products.spec_en: Post-process dual anti-static polyester; face, adhesive and liner anti-static; peel voltage < 100 V; 2 mil gloss white; -40~180 °C; UL 969
products.spec_zh: 后处理双抗静电聚酯;面层、胶面、底纸全防静电;剥离电压 <100V;2mil 光面白;-40~180℃;UL 969

products.spec_en: Ultra-thin polyester; compact, cost-optimised, for micro devices; 1 mil; -40~85 °C
products.spec_zh: 超薄聚酯;超薄微型、成本优化、微型设备专用;1mil;-40~85℃

products.spec_en: Colour dual anti-static polyester; colour sorting, LN2- and chemical-resistant; gloss colour
products.spec_zh: 彩色双抗静电聚酯;彩色快速分类、耐液氮耐化学;光面彩色
